steps.title: Identify the input value
steps.content: The variable $x$ represents minutes after the airplane begins to descend. Since we want the height 4 minutes after descent begins, we need to find $f(4)$.

steps.title: Evaluate the function at x = 4
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 4$ into $f(x) = -40x + 280$:
$$f(4) = -40(4) + 280$$
$$f(4) = -160 + 280$$
$$f(4) = 120$$
The predicted height is 120 feet. That matches choice A — A is correct.
